antipattern.symptom: CJK / RTL corpus retrieval underperforms by 15+ pp Recall@10; Latin corpus has 60-token chunks.
antipattern.root-cause: chunk_size measured in characters; effective token count varies 2-4x across alphabets.
antipattern.fix: Use the embedder's tokenizer to count tokens. `len(tokenizer.encode(text))`. Set unit=`tokens`.

antipattern.symptom: Boundary-split sentences become unsearchable; 5-8% Recall@10 lost on prose corpora.
antipattern.fix: Set overlap ≥10% of chunk_size on prose strategies. Token cost rises ~10% but recall recovers.

antipattern.symptom: Functions split mid-body; retrieval returns half-functions; generator hallucinates the rest.
antipattern.fix: Use structural strategy (function-boundary) for code: split at top-level def/class only.

antipattern.symptom: Silent truncation by embedder; recall on long docs degrades.
antipattern.fix: Set max_tokens ≤ embedder context - 64 (safety margin). Reject configs that exceed.
